data_notes: Goalscorer records are available for ~40% of all matches (systematic gaps in 1998, 2002, 2006, 2010, 2014, 2018, 2020).
Team names have been standardised: Curaçao→Curacao, Shetland Islands→Shetland, Macedonia→North Macedonia, etc.
Historical nations (Czechoslovakia, FR Yugoslavia, Serbia & Montenegro) mapped to modern successors.
Non-FIFA regional entities (ConIFA members: Gotland, Hitra, Isle of Man…) are present in the data and flagged with region='Non-FIFA'.
